preLabel: jsonfg-dggs profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return DGGS-JSON-FG representation; using dggsPlace to encode geometry points quantized to sub-zone; represented as local indices from 1 to the number of sub-zones corresponding to the DGGRS deterministic sub-zone order; with a special value of 0 representing an artificial node

preLabel: jsonfg-dggs-plus profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return DGGS-JSON-FG representation; with GeoJSON compatibility geometry

preLabel: jsonfg-dggs-zoneids profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return DGGS-JSON-FG representation; using dggsPlace to encode geometry points as textual global zone identifiers; with a special value of null representing an artificial node

preLabel: jsonfg-dggs-zoneids-plus profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return DGGS-JSON-FG representation; encoding geometry points as global zone IDs; with GeoJSON compatibility geometry

preLabel: netcdf3 profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return NetCDF classic and 64-bit offset format (not quantized to DGGH)

preLabel: netcdf3-dggs profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return NetCDF classic and 64-bit offset format where one axis corresponds to local sub-zone indices

preLabel: netcdf3-dggs-zoneids profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return NetCDF classic and 64-bit offset format where one axis corresponds to the global identifiers of sub-zones (textual or 64-bit integer)

preLabel: netcdf4 profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return HFG5-based NetCDF 4 format (not quantized to DGGH)

preLabel: netcdf4-dggs profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return HDF5-based NetCDF 4 format where one axis corresponds to local sub-zone indices

preLabel: netcdf4-dggs-zoneids profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return HDF5-based NetCDF 4 format where one axis corresponds to the global identifiers of sub-zones (textual or 64-bit integer)

preLabel: zarr2 profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return zipped Zarr 2.0 (not quantized to DGGH)

preLabel: zarr2-dggs profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return zipped Zarr 2.0 where one axis corresponds to local sub-zone indices

preLabel: zarr2-dggs-zoneids profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return zipped Zarr 2.0 where one axis corresponds to the global identifiers of sub-zones (textual or 64-bit integer)

preLabel: covjson profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return CoverageJSON (not quantized to DGGH)

preLabel: covjson-dggs profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return CoverageJSON where one axis corresponds to local sub-zone indices

preLabel: covjson-dggs-zoneids profile of DGGS zone data
definition: return CoverageJSON where one axis corresponds to the global identifiers of sub-zones (textual or 64-bit integer)
